options.description: Specify the platform of gem to install

subcommands.name: cert
subcommands.description: Manage RubyGems certificates and signing settings

options.description: Add a trusted certificate
List trusted certificates where the subject contains FILTER
Remove trusted certificates where the subject contains FILTER

Key for --sign or --build

Signs CERT with the key from -K and the certificate from -C
Days before the certificate expires
Re-signs the certificate from -C with the key from -K

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Check a gem repository for added or missing files

options.description: Report 'unmanaged' or rogue files in the gem repository
Report 'managed' or rogue files in the gem repository
Clean up uninstalled gems and broken specifications
Do not clean up uninstalled gems and broken specifications
Do not remove files, only report what would be removed
Remove files

Check not installed gems for problems
Specify version of gem to check

subcommands.name: cleanup

options.description: Do not uninstall gems
Check development dependencies while uninstalling (default: true)
Do not check development dependencies while uninstalling

Cleanup in GEM_HOME instead of user’s home directory

Contents for all gems

Not only return files in the Gem’s lib_dirs

Include installed path prefix

Do not show only the gem install dir
